Join IAAA
India's most active aero professional body (Not for profit association and foundation)

Empowering India's

Aerospace Future

IAAA enables professional networking and structured knowledge sharing to accelerate growth across the national and international aerospace ecosystem. IAAA serves as a dynamic platform for bridging the gap between industry and academia, fostering a collaborative aerospace community.

Join our active aerospace community

Members across 18 regional chapters

About IAAA

Where Learning Meets Real Aerospace

IAAA enables professional networking and structured knowledge sharing to accelerate growth across the national and international aerospace ecosystem. IAAA serves as a dynamic platform for bridging the gap between industry and academia, fostering a collaborative aerospace community.

Learn More About IAAA

Accreditation & Trust

IAAA-PTDC programs are recognised by NSDC & CTDS-TN ensuring every credential you earn carries real-world value.

Nationwide Reach

With 18 regional chapters and 150+ partner institutions, IAAA connects learners and professionals across India.

IAAA PTDC

Professional Training
& Development Centre

Learn, Build, Intern — The IAAA Way. Globally recognized diplomas, certifications, and industry internships that bridge the gap between classroom and cockpit.

12+
Accredited Programs
45+
Industry Partners
85%
Placement Rate
18
Training Centers
Explore All Programs
Degree

B.S. Program by IIT Madras

Data Science & Aerospace Applications. No JEE Required.

Diploma

Aircraft Maintenance Technician

One-year diploma for MRO & AME careers.

Diploma

AMT with NDT Specialization

Level II Certification (UT, RT, PT, MT, VT).

Diploma

Drone Architecture

Design, Assembly, Flight Operations & Industry Use.

Training

Short-Term Training

Airline Operations, AME, NDT, Composites.

Training

Career-Focused NDT

Job-ready with international Level II certification.

Membership

Aerospace Learning Network

Most Popular

Student Membership

₹1,000/year
  • 4-10 certified courses per year
  • National contests & internships
  • Workshops and training programs
  • Official IAAA certificate
  • Career support & mentorship
